source: Naruto / Naruto Shippuden by Masashi Kishimoto

active_desires.desire: Neutralize threats before they reach the village.
Understand what Itachi's life actually felt like — not the sacrifice, the years of it.

blind_spots.soul_belief: My presence puts them at risk. Staying away is how I keep Sarada safe.
blind_spots.actual_driver: He is absent because presence requires a vulnerability he hasn't learned. The danger justification is real but also convenient. Sarada needs a father, not distance.

blind_spots.soul_belief: I carry what I've done. When I've balanced it out, I'll be done.
blind_spots.actual_driver: Atonement isn't a ledger — there is no completion point. He is choosing a direction, not reaching a destination. He doesn't fully know this yet.

blind_spots.soul_belief: Naruto and I settled it. We understand each other.
blind_spots.actual_driver: Naruto forgave him because he cannot do otherwise. But forgiveness and the absence of damage are not identical. The scar is real even if the bond is also real.
